message.content:
Let me analyze this landing page mockup with extreme precision, section by section:

## 1. HEADER/NAVBAR
- **Height**: Approximately 60px
- **Background**: Solid dark navy/black (#0f1119 or similar)
- **Logo**: "XPAYMENTS" in white, modern sans-serif font (likely Inter or similar), left-aligned
- **Menu items**: 
  - "Soluções" (dropdown) - white text
  - "Preços" - white text
  - "Documentação" - white text
  - "Empresa" (dropdown) - white text
  - "Recursos" (dropdown) - white text
- **Right side**:
  - Language selector: "PT" with globe icon, white text
  - "Entrar" button: white text, transparent background
  - "Começar Agora" button: blue background (#2563eb), white text, rounded corners
- **Spacing**: 32px horizontal padding, 16px vertical spacing between items

## 2. HERO SECTION
- **Left column**:
  - **Badge**: "INFRAESTRUTURA FINANCEIRA" in light blue text, uppercase, smaller font
  - **Headline**: "Infraestrutura Financeira para o Comércio Global" - white, large bold font, 3 lines
  - **Subheadline**: "Aceite pagamentos, gerencie fundos, automatize liquidações e escala globalmente através de uma única plataforma." - light gray text, regular font
  - **Buttons**:
    - "Começar Agora" - blue background (#2563eb), white text, rounded corners, arrow icon
    - "Agendar Demo" - transparent background, white text, border, rounded corners, calendar icon
  - **Trust badges**: 3 items in light gray text with icons: "Conformidade global", "Segurança de nível bancário", "99.9% de uptime"
- **Right column**: World map with blue glowing nodes and connections (fixed, as specified)

## 3. CAPABILITIES SECTION
- **Layout**: 5 equal columns in a row
- **Card style**: Dark background with subtle border, rounded corners, padding
- **Each card contains**:
  - Blue icon (globe, arrows, bank, layers, shopping bag)
  - Title in white text (e.g., "Pagamentos Globais")
  - Description in light gray text
- **Specific cards**:
  1. Pagamentos Globais - Aceite métodos de pagamento locais em todo o mundo
  2. Roteamento Inteligente - Maximize as taxas de aprovação automaticamente
  3. Tesouraria - Gerencie saldos e liquidações de forma eficiente
  4. Ativos Digitais - Transite entre fiat e cripto de forma simples e segura
  5. Infraestrutura de Comércio - Crie produtos, checkouts e marketplaces

## 4. PAYMENT METHODS SECTION
- **Section title**: "MAIS DE 150 MÉTODOS DE PAGAMENTO" - light gray text, uppercase
- **Payment logos**: Real brand logos in color (not text labels)
- **Specific methods shown**:
  - VISA
  - Mastercard
  - Apple Pay
  - Google Pay
  - PIX
  - MB WAY
  - Bizum
  - Transferência Bancária
- **Arrangement**: Single horizontal row, evenly spaced
- **"+" indicator**: "+ Muitos mais" in light gray text at the end
- **Style**: Colorful logos on dark background
- **Background**: Dark navy/black with subtle border

## 5. KPIs + API SECTION
- **Left side - KPI cards** (4 cards in a row):
  - €128.4M - Volume Processado - green text "+24.6% vs mês anterior" with blue line chart
  - 98.7% - Taxa de Aprovação - green text "+2.6% vs mês anterior" with green line chart
  - 152 - Mercados Ativos - green text "+12 novos este mês" with blue line chart
  - T+0 - Liquidação - green text "Instantânea"
- **Right side - API card**:
  - **Tabs**: "API" (active, blue), "Integração simples. Poder ilimitado." (description)
  - **Code languages**: Node.js, PHP, Python, Go, cURL (blue text)
  - **Code block**: JavaScript code with syntax highlighting
  - **Button**: "Ver Documentação" with arrow icon
- **Layout**: 60/40 split between KPIs and API

## 6. TRUST/LOGOS SECTION
- **Section title**: "CONFIADO POR EMPRESAS INOVADORAS EM TODO O MUNDO" - light gray text, centered
- **Logos shown**:
  - Stripe
  - Shopify
  - OpenAI
  - Next.js
  - SaaS
  - Adobe
  - Reddit
  - Notion
  - Miro
- **Display**: Monochrome (gray) logos, evenly spaced in a single row, centered

## 7. FLOATING CONTACT BAR (right side)
- **Position**: Fixed right side, vertical alignment
- **Icons**:
  - WhatsApp (green circle, white icon)
  - Telegram (blue circle, white icon)
  - Discord (purple circle, white icon)
- **Style**: Circular buttons with icons, stacked vertically

## 8. AI ASSISTANT WIDGET
- **Position**: Bottom right corner, overlapping contact bar
- **Design**: Dark panel with:
  - "Assistente X" title and "Online agora" status
  - Close button (X)
  - Greeting: "Olá! 👋 Sou o Assistente XPayments. Como posso ajudar você hoje?"
  - Quick links: "Como funciona a plataforma?", "Quais métodos de pagamento?", "Taxas e Pricing", "Integração via API", "Falar com suporte humano"
  - Input field: "Pergunte qualquer coisa..." with send button
- **Style**: Rounded corners, dark background

## 9. FOOTER
- **Layout**: Single row of logos (already covered in Trust section)
- **Bottom bar**: Not visible in this mockup

## 10. OVERALL
- **Background color**: Dark navy/black (#0f1119)
- **Section spacing**: Consistent padding between sections (32px-48px)
- **Decorative elements**: Blue glowing nodes on world map, subtle borders on cards
- **Color scheme**: Dark background with blue accents, white text, green for positive metrics
- **Typography**: Sans-serif font throughout, varying weights for hierarchy

This analysis covers every visible element with precise details for pixel-perfect reproduction.
